name: Hero's Story
short_description: Fight monsters, look for treasures and defeat powerful bosses in this blend of first-person action and RPG! Save Teandria - an ancient kingdom on the verge of collapse, or let it be destroyed. This is your story!
detailed_description:
Hero's Story is a first-person indie action game with role-playing elements. The action takes place in the kingdom of Teandria, which is in decline, and the main character is a young mercenary who got into trouble. You need to get out of the dungeon and find out what happened.

Key Features


  • Multi-region open world
  • Dozens of items, quests and enemies
  • Four unique character classes
  • Quality graphics with modern effects support
  • Partial controller support
  • Physics and partial destructibility of the game world

Explore


Explore the lands of central Teandria, stretching from northern lands of the Swamp of Myths to the sands of the Endless Desert in the south. Various treasures, clever traps and a lot of secrets are waiting for you! Be careful and be attentive - but remember that sometimes the path itself is more important than the goal.


Fight


There is a split in the kingdom. In this time of troubles, the undead rose from the graves, robbers and scoundrels flooded the roads, and dryads attack careless travelers in the forests. In the depths of caves and crypts, huge creatures are waiting for you, which will not be easy to cope with without the appropriate equipment.


Rise


In the world of Hero's Story, various factions are fighting for power. You can join one of the opposing sides, or you can choose your own path. Each of your actions will affect how the inhabitants of the kingdom will perceive the young hero. Use everything you need to win.

This is your story!

Unique game


A distinctive feature of Hero's Story is that the game has been created by one person for many years. Also this game appeared on Steam thanks to the choice of players in the Steam Greenlight system.
